core_mechanism: beyond-all-orders (exponential) asymptotics: a two-scale singular-perturbation expansion carried to high order whose divergent asymptotic series is optimally truncated to expose an exponentially small correction invisible at every finite order
brief_reason: The abstract carries a multiple-scale (slow/fast) perturbation analysis to arbitrarily large order, confronts the divergent asymptotic series, and uses optimal truncation to extract a non-trivial exponentially small phase shift — the signature of asymptotics beyond all orders.
